meaning: adj.比喻的,修饰丰富的,形容多的
examples: His career spanned some 50 years and encompassed both abstract and figurative painting.
The themes can be figures, landscapes, flowers and birds, and the techniques can be divided into figurative painting and freehand painting.
I'm not being figurative or clever here.
But there are still plenty of breweries around the world playing their figurative hearts out.
The exhibition includes pioneering figurative work by 23 Indian artists, dating through the 1980s.
